Thanks to Intermountain Immigration for their support; they are always attentive to every step and everything that happens with the cases. God bless them.

Attorney Adam and his team, including Carlos, are very professional. I appreciated their ability to listen and adapt client requests to the needs of the immigration process. They are meticulous in preparing the case presentation and ensure everything is well-organized. During the interview, Adam was present and clearly explained the legal arguments necessary for making a decision. Thank you so much for everything!

I take this moment to thank God and especially attorney Jonathan and his extraordinary team who accompanied me through this process of rebirth. Clarisa and Gheisa, thank you so much, and we pray that God will bless you abundantly for what you have done for our family.

With our sincerest gratitude for your brilliant work, tireless dedication, and exceptional support. You have made a real difference in Carlos's defense. We continue to trust in you.

With appreciation,

I am undeservedly blessed and grateful to God for placing professionals like them in this stage of my life. I previously wasted almost two years with other lawyers, but with Intermountain, in less than five months, God granted me my residency card. They were always in contact with me until the very end of the process. Now, two members of my family are under their guidance.
God bless them.
We met with lawyer Krista; the advice was very good, and we hope to continue working on our case.

We won our asylum case with this team in 2022. After that, we applied for permanent residency, and today we are residents, thanks also to their work. Our paralegal, Carlos González, has always been very kind and available. Every time I contact him, he responds patiently and clearly, always attentive to our questions and diligent when we need to schedule an appointment with the attorney.

We are currently handling my husband's I-730 case with them, and having someone on the other end of the phone who truly responds, guides, and provides peace of mind is invaluable. We feel supported and secure throughout the entire process.

Hello everyone. First of all, I want to thank the entire Intermountain Immigration team for their great work. They were very attentive and kept me informed every step of the way during my adjustment of status process, which was completed quickly. I also want to thank Mr. Carlos González for his respectful and helpful handling of my calls and messages. Thank you to the entire team.

I heard of Intermountain immigration because they had helped my uncles and a couple more family members accomplish residency. When I first reached out they were very welcoming and attentive. They were very supportive every step of the way and I am very grateful for them and would recommend to anyone wanting or needing help for immigration purposes.

Excellent! She was spot on in everything she said; they don't lie to you. They act immediately, informing you concisely what needs to be done. I've followed them since I arrived, and I think they're very professional. Krista is definitely my favorite! I love her!

I want to express my sincere gratitude to the entire team for the excellent work they did on my permanent residency application. From the beginning to the end of the process, I felt supported, guided, and in good hands.

I especially want to highlight the paralegal, Carlos Gonzales, who was incredibly patient with me and always showed an exceptional willingness to help. Communication with him was truly five-star: clear, easy, consistent, and very friendly, which made the whole process much more manageable and less stressful for me.

My case is proof that it is possible, and I hope my experience serves as an inspiration to others going through an immigration process. With the right support, God's guidance, and unwavering faith and hope, it is possible to succeed despite adversity.

I highly recommend this lawyer and his team for their professionalism, compassion, and commitment. Thank you for helping me achieve this great dream!

With the exception of Attorney Adam Call, who took ownership of our case and knocked it out of the park at the end, this place was an absolute nightmare. They didn't know what they were doing and gave my wife incorrect legal advice, which caused two-year delay in the process and lost her $5000. They were horrible about communicating with us, even after we reached out to them multiple times. Once we finished making our payment installments to them, they never returned our calls or emails. I would not recommend them to anyone at all for any reason. And the reason for that, is that even though Adam came in at the end and squared everything away for us, they had him call me after I posted this review to ask what they could do to make the situation better so I would leave a higher review. I don't have a problem with that if somebody genuinely wants to make something right, instead of insult us. First, having Adam call us and not taking responsibility for themselves, speaks very lowly of them. They put him, a newer attorney with their firm, in a very awkward position. That is horribly unprofessional and cowardly. Adam and I had a great amicable conversation, and I told him that what would make it right as far as we were concerned was to refund the $5000 that they lost my wife from having given her bad legal advice. They offered $500, instead, which is a slap in the face to my wife for the extra worry and delay their inexperienced legal advice caused her. DO NOT RECOMMEND.

I was referred to Jake by his grandma since 2019 for consultation and filing of my mother's petition (I-130) since I knew no one in Utah who could assist me with immigration process. Intermountain Immigration Law Firm went an extra mile in walking me through the process since then, including my adjustment of status and in the removal of conditions in my green card. Thank you to the team of Intermountain Immigration Law Firm. I definitely recommend your service. Keep up the good work!

Choosing Intermountain Immigration was the best decision I could have made. Dr. Jonathan's firm has the best team. From the moment I started my asylum application process, I have felt calm and confident, with incredible professional and human support.
Excellent work and grateful to the whole team for their good attention and management ... blessings to you
Excellent service and excellent customer service. The most important thing is the responsibility and commitment to each case.
Good afternoon, dear friends of Intermountain Immigration. Excellent work. Thank you for the solution.
Money and time wasted, the administrative team a disaster
Excellent team! 👍🏻 The lawyers are very attentive 👏🏻 and it's very reassuring to have them working on our cases 🫶🏻 Thanks to the whole team
Sandra was very kind and friendly during the call.

My name is Eneida B. I urge everyone about to begin their immigration process to make this the last place they come to. I had a terrible experience with this firm. The attorney, Jonathan, will never give an answer or explanation for the inefficiency of his awful team. I was advised by an attorney named Jack, who seemed to be doing me a favor, and his advice led me to wait for over seven years for an answer regarding my residency. Obviously, I had to pay double, and after everything that happened, no one could help me with anything about my case. They just blamed each other, and I always ended up investigating things on my own. At the end of the process, they assigned me to an attorney who was able to help me a little more, but it wasn't until I exploded and demanded to speak with attorney Jonathan that he finally showed up. Even at the very end, my husband, who is also a lawyer, tried to have a conversation about the terrible service throughout the process and how frustrating this whole time had been for me, when I was on the verge of losing my life. My grandmothers are in Mexico and I couldn't get in touch with them, and all he offered was an apology through our last lawyer—an apology that came with mockery and cynicism.
Please 🙏🏼, before hiring them, look for another place. At first, they'll give you attention because they want the payment, but once you pay, they'll just ignore you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Just for those reading this message: the green card was fully approved for this person. Immigration ended up requesting more information on the case, and obviously, even though clients try to speak ill of us because they don't fully understand the process, we must keep everything confidential, even though we have evidence of everything that happened. I would like to respond to each point, but our ethical guidelines don't allow me to share confidential details of the case, so I'm unable to defend ourselves because I have to follow ethical guidelines and not disclose details publicly. The case was a complete success, fully approved. USCIS processing times are beyond our control. We are also obviously under an administration that makes everything much more difficult for immigrants, and sometimes clients blame us. This person received their fully approved green card more than three months ago and now has the freedom to travel and all the rights of a resident. However it's phrased this way, we consider it a success for our team in handling a sensitive case with many confidential details, ensuring the client's success, especially given that this administration could have so easily dismissed such a complex case. Congratulations to the client!

I wholeheartedly recommend Adam Call to anyone who needs an immigration attorney who truly cares and gets results. I couldn't have asked for a better advocate.

Through our work at KevinRoot Medical, we support thousands of physicians across the country. Given today’s legal and regulatory environment, I strongly recommend that all physicians take proactive steps to protect themselves and their families. The asset-protection structures established by LegalMine provide a level of security and confidence that I believe is essential—whether facing malpractice risk, automobile liability, or other unforeseen events. I would encourage every physician in our network to seriously consider putting these protections in place.

I strongly recommend that physicians protect themselves and their families using the legal structures established by LegalMine. I have far greater confidence knowing I’m protected in the event of car accidents, malpractice claims, or other unforeseen liabilities. The United States offers tremendous freedom—but that freedom also requires personal responsibility. LegalMine helped me put the right protections in place.

Legally Mine has been a disappointment. I signed up for their service after hearing from Gary at a medical conference. The pitch was to medical professionals wanting to protect themselves from lawsuits.
The communication from their team has been terrible. I consulted with Dustin for help with filing an LLC and he lied and told me it was being taken care of. After multiple emails, I found out that nothing had been done and the start of my business was delayed by months after my misplaced trust that they were doing what they said they would do.
We filled out paperwork for the creation of LLCs and have been left in the dark regarding what is going on. I've been told they are short-staffed, that our file won't be done for months, etc, etc. I reached out to Gary since his pitch was the reason we signed with this company and my emails have been ignored.
They haven't bothered to explain the process, the timeline, or communicate any expectations.
There has been a total lack of customer service and support, which creates unneeded frustration and distrust.
I would recommend looking elsewhere. This has been a waste of time and money. We could have created our own LLCs for all of the guidance we've received from this company.

We've used Legally Mine for many years for asset protection and estate planning for personal and business needs.  Being in  business since the late 1980's and can tell you that these guys are probably in my top 5 (maybe higher) ranked by most responsive, satisfied with their work, professional, get things done in a very quick timeframe...............the list goes on.  Legally Mine has set up 20+ entities for us and created a very simple yet comprehensive "Blueprint" of our assets.  Lenders are quite impressed with the document showing this, and how they are all connected.  In addition to the asset protection side, they have also put together a very detailed estate plan showing where all assets are to go after we're out of the picture.

It's rare to get a company that has it all and be100% satisfied with them from day one.  Legally Mine has been that for our family and businesses.  I would highly recommend them for these services.  You won't be disappointed.

Terry Boone
TEAM MANAGEMENT PROPERTIES, LLC / ARKAD Manufacturing, Inc. / The Clean Machine Laundry

Like I said, we are close to having everything in order but from what I can see so far from the various forms of correspondence, including rough drafts, we are going to be happy with the final trust package and entity creation. The only big delays have been on our side, either from forgetting to answer an email or challenges with our county’s processes.

reviews.text: Great service. Highly recommended to protect your assets

The process started out promising, but when we finally met with the lawyer, he made it clear that they only focus on asset protection and not tax savings. Since our primary goal was tax savings, the meeting provided little to no value for us. We had already paid $10,000 upfront, and after asking for a refund, we were told that $2,500 would be deducted for the meeting, leaving $7,500 to be refunded. I agreed to that just to get my money back.

That was back in June, and months later I’m still being told that “no funds are available” and that a check will be mailed once there are. In reality, this so-called “100% money-back guarantee” means nothing. I would strongly caution anyone considering their services.
The tax strategies their legal team provided me helped significantly with my taxes last year. We’ve wanted a trust for a while now and it’s great peace of mind having that set up!

reviews.text: Terrible company. Don’t walk away…RUN!!! After meeting with them I consulted with my lawyer and he actually contacted the Utah attorney general to investigate these guys. After reviewing the contract, we were entitled to a sizable refund, but we have been fighting with their bookkeeper, Ricardo for over 3 months . We have not received a dime.

reviews.ownerResponse:
N. Rezapour, we’re sorry for any frustration you’ve experienced and appreciate the opportunity to address your concerns. Our records show that we completed your individual blueprint and filed all your new entities May of last year, which aligns with a reasonable timeline for setup. We understand that your county’s unique property requirements may have added complexity, and we’ve aimed to respond to your inquiries as quickly as possible despite these challenges.
Tax savings are a cornerstone of our service, and we’re committed to ensuring you benefit from them. Last April, we reviewed specific tax strategies tailored to your income and sent the blueprint. Pages 4-6 of the blueprint outline your specific tax savings and the total amount which exceeds the cost of investment to protect all your entities. There’s still ample time to implement these before this year’s filing deadline. We stand by our promise that the program’s cost will be offset by your savings—and if for any reason that doesn’t happen, our guarantee honors to make up the difference.
We’ve tried our best to work diligently with you and hope to resolve any remaining concerns and ensure you’re fully satisfied. Thank you for your patience and trust in us.

The worst experience we have ever had with an attorney

Thinking about declaring bankruptcy? Go literally anywhere but here. We have had nothing but problems. There as been little to no communication. They don’t relay messages to paralegals or attorneys. I’m convinced this office didn’t actually notify creditors. No one ever returns a phone call. They lost checks we were supposed to get back from garnishments. Then they tried to gaslight me into saying they never received any checks. Then they never applied the funds to our balance. They refuse to send me a statement to show what’s owed. I am constantly calling to have questions answered and no one ever calls. I knew about our discharge before they did. We have discharged already and I still have creditors calling me. Yet I still can’t get anyone to call me back. You know why they will do though? They’ll text me for a payment without fail. If I could do it over again I’d pick literally anyone else.
Jenny is simply the best. She makes the process easy and answers any questions that you have.

These attorneys are the model for the stereotypical attorney jokes! Dishonest, and dismissing. Will try to exploit you. They will take a large retainer fee and in the fine print of the contract you will find a clause explaining that they will not refund it, even if they didn’t earn it… so they’ll falsify the records and make up all kinds of bogus entires. Unanswered and unreceived emails and not showing up to scheduled meetings and then saying they were there, are just a few tricks Rogers and Russell will try. In addition, they have no problem exploiting and taking advantage of people they think have ample means and seniors. I will be writing to the Utah State Bar as well as the attorney general about the specifics of my experience with R&R. I personally worked with the office on Main Street in Pleasant Grove from Sept 2024 to when I finally fired them in early 2025. I lost $5000 and got nothing for it except falsified records and garbage excuses. Hire R&R at your peril! Trying to warn others to stay away! These attorneys will not defend you, and in addition a lot of their reviews are from people who work in their office or their friends and family members who have padded their ratings.
reviews.ownerResponse: April, Unfortunately we are unable to find you in any of our records as a client. I'm not sure what experience you had or with what office. I hired Wiley Thomas to defend me in a criminal case.

He was rude, disrespectful untimely and I would not refer him to anyone.

They responded with false information, I've never been unprofessional, they just have a problem when someone that's paying them wants to hold them responsible for being late for a scheduled phone call, or missing it entirely.

They will also charge you outrageous prices and not even look at the footage.  Wiley made it very clear any time I was on the phone with him that I was an unimportant client, and clearly wasn't paying enough for him to be able to spare time for me or my case.  He didn't even look at the body cam footage before he decided that I should take a plea deal.

Just remember when you pick a lawyer, there are three sides to the truth and I would steer clear of this individual; do yourself a favor and call three more lawyers after contacting Wiley and ask if they've ever even heard of him.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Brandin, I'm sorry you feel disrespected by our firm in any way. We are proud to serve our clients with compassion, respect, and professionalism. However, we expect the same in return. Unfortunately, not every client relationship is a good fit.
After multiple instances of disrespect and discourtesy toward our staff, we made the decision to end our representation of you. We stand by our choice fully.
Legal matters are often stressful, but that never justifies mistreatment of the professionals who work hard on your behalf. We wish you well and hope you're able to find a firm better suited to your expectations and communication style.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for sharing your wonderful experience! We are truly honored to be part of your EB3 visa journey and delighted to hear that Komal Mehta and the entire ImmiVisa team have been able to support you and your family every step of the way.

Navigating the immigration process can indeed be challenging, and we’re committed to making it as smooth and manageable as possible. It’s great to know that our efforts in guiding you through document compilation and answering your questions promptly have made a positive impact.

We appreciate your trust in our firm and are hopeful for a successful outcome with your DS-260 filing and upcoming interview. Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you need any further assistance — we’re here to help!

reviews.text:
Big thanks to ImmiVisa Law Group! Jacob, Michelle, Jonely, and Lisa helped a lot with my EB-2 NIW papers. They made everything easy and answered questions super fast. It helped me so much. I highly recommend them!
My timeline so far:
- March 2024: Engaged ImmiVisa
- May 2024: Filed I-140 petition
- July 2024: RFE received
- September 2024: I-140 approved
- October 2025: Filed I-485 AOS
My story is still ongoing—fingers crossed for smooth sailing ahead. Hope this helps others on the same path!
The process was very quick and efficient as far as immigration processes go. Our immigrant documents were rejected until we went to ImmiVisa Law Group for help.

ImmiVisa Law Group were very helpful from the beginning to the end. They made sure to help make this case as simple as possible to our side. I am very grateful for all the support received at any time that was needed to answer questions and doubts.

I’m grateful to the Immivisa team for their outstanding work on my EB-1A I-140 petition, starting from my initial call with Jake about a year ago, who helped assess my profile, to the final approval after an RFE response. Their expertise, precision, and calm guidance during a stressful stage of the process made all the difference.

They reviewed every aspect of my case thoroughly, strengthened my evidence, and crafted a powerful response that clearly demonstrated my eligibility. Their attention to detail, strategic thinking, and commitment to my success were exceptional. A special thank you to Johanna Acevedo who helped me structure my achievements effectively — including patents, publications, and letters from industry leaders — into a cohesive and persuasive case. Their guidance on documentation and presentation made a significant difference.

Thanks to their hard work and professionalism, my petition was approved. I highly recommend ImmiVisa to anyone seeking expert help with EB1A.

I had an amazing experience with IMMVISA! Their team has successfully handled both the approval and renewal of my E-2 investor visa, and I couldn’t be happier with their professionalism and dedication.
They guided me through every step of the process with clarity, patience, and genuine care. I always felt supported and confident, knowing I was in expert hands. I highly recommend IMMVISA to anyone seeking reliable and knowledgeable immigration services, they truly go above and beyond! :)

I want to thank the entire ImmiVisa team, especially Lorena Tippets, who has always been very attentive since our first WhatsApp conversations, and my case manager, Vivien Van Roy, who excels in her work. I also couldn't forget to mention the excellent lawyers I had the pleasure of speaking with: Jacob and Felipe, and of course, my lawyer, Kelsey. Thank you all, and may God bless our cases for renewing my GC and applying for my daughter.

Working with ImmiVisa  Law Group is such a  blessing for me and our company. Komal Mehta is such a pleasure to work with and I am grateful for getting all of our labor certifications approved and my recent 140 approved. We are so grateful and eagerly await our new employee to join us.
Thank you again for service and professionalism.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing your great experience.

reviews.text:
I can’t recommend Jacob and his team highly enough! After being dismissed or ignored by other immigration lawyers, Jacob took the time to really listen and understand my case. What stood out most was his honesty - he told me the truth, even when others were just trying to sell me on empty promises. He and his team paid close attention to every detail and, most importantly, they tackled a case that was very specific - based on an O1 visa.

My situation was complex because proving credibility in the arts, PR, and music industry is very subjective. Most lawyers I spoke to didn’t know how to navigate that—but Jacob and his team did. Thanks to their expertise and dedication!

If you’re looking for someone who is straightforward, meticulous, and willing to take on the tough cases, Jacob and his team are the ones you want in your corner.
Jacob is through, engaging, and an excellent conversationalist regarding our questions. He helped us out with our situation, beautifully. Thank you and you deserve these 5 stars!
They are always there for you. Either if you have questions or need to council. They have done a great job for me, I'm sure they will do the same for you.
I had a bad experience because they called us late, made us make two trips to the consulate, and we spent money for nothing only to have our visa denied due to their administrative errors.

Terrible experience.  In this case I schedule with a lawyer named Erika that was pretending that she cares about my case. I've been researching about my case for months through chat GTP. I need a lawyer that works with PCRF and she said that PCRF doesn't exist! Guess what I did: I went to Provo court and asked a person from their staff to help me to download a PCRF from their website. And here I got in my computer a form she said it didn't exist.  She tried to manipulate me into buying something very ineffective for my case instead of trying to make justice for me. She could have said : I don't handle PCRF but no, she thought she could mislead me. And I paid $80 dollars consultation to hear a lie and someone who doesn't believe me, trying to sell me something totally ineffective for $1000 dollars.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your feedback. We are sorry to hear the experience did not meet your expectations, and would like to clarify a few important points for accuracy and transparency.
Based on your notes to schedule the consultation, this consultation was booked to determine specifically if it was safe for you to travel to your country, as a green card holder, based on the situation you shared about your case, only for immigration purposes.
As per our records, the attorney asked for more information about your specific case in order to be able to advise you specifically on this issue for immigration purposes, which she did after receiving your information.
Due to the interest of our attorney in your case, she told you she suggested working on a more detailed memo pointing out your specific situation and risks to travel. Finally, based on other concerns you expressed, she told you to look for another attorney if you needed any other type of advice not related to our immigration expertise or practice.
Our track record speaks for itself. We’ve helped hundreds of ImmiVisa clients successfully navigate their immigration concerns.

It’s disappointing to see inaccurate information posted online, especially when we work hard to serve with integrity and transparency.

We wish you and your family the best moving forward.

reviews.text:
It was a great experience working with Immi Visa Law Group. I had worked with Immi Visa Law Group for my EB1A I-140 process. The legal team is knowledgeable in this EB1A I-140 process and their smart work of drafting 1500 pages of documentation  and dedication made all the difference, the attention to detail and thoroughness were invaluable.

Henrique, Josephus, Felipe and Jacob are excellent professionals I recommend to everyone. They helped me on my case and I am pretty sure It will be accepted.

From F-1 Student Visa to U.S. Permanent Resident — Thanks to Jake and Immivisa!

I began working with Immivisa in early Fall 2022, and my experience has been nothing short of exceptional! Having lived in the U.S. since 2008, I had naturally consulted with several immigration attorneys over the years. Some never prioritized the EB-2 NIW (National Interest Waiver) — a category for professionals with advanced degrees or exceptional ability — as a pathway for me, while others questioned my eligibility for the EB-2 NIW category altogether. From our very first conversation, however, Jake was confident I was a strong candidate, and he and his team at Immivisa committed themselves fully to my success.

We submitted my EB-2 NIW in March 2023, and I was deeply grateful when it was approved by April 3, 2023,  no request for evidence, no interview. Because of a backlog,  we could not file the adjustment of status right away. Nonetheless, Immivisa guided me through securing an O-1A (Extraordinary Ability) work visa in February 2024 so I could transition from an F-1 student visa. In late 2024, once the backlog cleared, we filed my adjustment of status, and in June 2025, I received my permanent resident card!

After being in the U.S. since 2008 and earning a Certificate in Early Childhood Education, AS in Writing Studies, BA in English, Master of Public Administration, Master of Applied Leadership Theory, and a PhD in Organizational Leadership,  this was a dream come true. Jake and his team’s expertise, dedication, and belief in me significantly shaped the outcome.

Thank you, Jake and Immivisa, for helping make my immigration dream a reality!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Reading your review truly made our day, and honestly, our whole year! It has been an honor to be part of your journey from arriving in the U.S. as an F-1 student in 2008 to achieving your dream of becoming a U.S. permanent resident in 2025. Your story is a testament to resilience, patience, and the power of strategic planning.

From the moment we first spoke, we could see the incredible accomplishments, dedication, and potential you had built over the years, both professionally and academically. It was clear to us that the EB-2 NIW was not just a possibility but a strong pathway for you, and we were determined to make that vision a reality. When the NIW approval came in record time without an RFE or interview, it was a huge milestone but just one part of the bigger picture.

Your trust in us allowed us to navigate the challenges together from securing your O-1A Extraordinary Ability visa during the backlog to filing your adjustment of status at the right time and finally, celebrating your green card approval in June 2025.

We are in awe of your academic journey, earning degrees from a Certificate in Early Childhood Education all the way to your PhD in Organizational Leadership, while simultaneously pursuing your immigration goals. That level of dedication is nothing short of inspiring.

Thank you for placing your confidence in Jake and our team. We are so proud to have been a part of this chapter in your life and can’t wait to see all the incredible things you will continue to accomplish in the U.S.

With heartfelt congratulations,
The Immivisa Team 💙

reviews.text: Our experience with this law office has been extremely disappointing. From the beginning, the receptionists and front desk staff were consistently rude and dismissive. Every time we called or visited in person, we were met with bad attitudes and unhelpful responses. They often acted as if our questions were an inconvenience, which made an already stressful immigration process even more frustrating. Another major issue was that we were never allowed to speak directly with the lawyer handling our case. No matter how important our concerns were, the receptionists always acted as a barrier, refusing to connect us or even pass along clear information. This lack of communication and basic courtesy made us feel ignored and disrespected. Based on our experience, I would not recommend this office to anyone seeking reliable and respectful service.
Their service was very attentive and fast; they always kept me informed about my case and offered me payment options.

My wife and I decided to hire Attorney Starr, and our case moved very quickly. Although we had to wait several months for a response from USCIS after the final interview, we understood that these processes are currently taking longer than usual. However, Attorney Starr was very diligent and astute, as was his assistant, Li, a very empowered, organized, and detail-oriented woman who seems more like a lawyer herself because of everything she does. They always answered my calls and even met with me in person without an appointment. The payment plan they offered was very affordable. I am very grateful to them all because they were very empathetic to our case. Patience is often necessary, but that's because USCIS has a very heavy workload and many challenges. I recommend them 100%.

My family hired Lance for our family's immediate proceeding hearing in 2009 and were faced with very little time to take quick action. His work was successful and we won our cases! The payment plan was awesome and very much appreciated too. He cares about his clients and his team are very alert to emails.
reviews.ownerResponse: Bryan, I'm surprised by your comments.  The second time you hired me we got the I-130 approved and we had filed the appropriate waiver and we were waiting for that to be approved when YOU called me and asked to have the waiver rescinded, which we did.  How can you claim there was no result when it was you who ended your case?  Also, I believe I responded to every email you ever sent me and did it in a timely, professional manner.  I'm sorry you feel your second experience wasn't as good as your first. I think we could have won your case had you continued with it.

This seems to be a repeating theme with these reviews. I have checked my files and I don't have any clients name "Connie". So, are you a real client or just a troll? You don't mention what type of case you had and you don't mention if it was ultimately completed successfully. I will note that, currently, almost any process involving the Immigration Service that is completed in 1 year and 5 months is actually quite extraordinary. Most of the services offered by CIS at anywhere from 3 to 7 years behind, so completing yours in only 1 year and 5 months is actually quite proficient.

reviews.text:
Lance Starr was my attorney in 2012 to 2019 he fought so much for me he represented me in a cancellation of removal. He appear personally in each court hearing and worked with my local attorney to release me from custody and fight my case. He made possible for me to be released from jail and continue the fight from outside. In the long process he was able to support my case in making the immigration Judge see the hardship my deportation will cause to my family. In the end I was deported and I had a different attorney fight my appeal with BIA. In the end because Lance C Start was able to prove the hardship, my new attorney was amazed of Lance and my case was remanded to the immigration court again. This time the immigration judge granted me the reliefs and Permanent Residency. The fight is over and I am forever grateful to Lance. He was the master and maker of immigration fight. His team and everyone that was on my side. Thank you and you want this team on your side.

reviews.ownerResponse:
I'm hoping that people will see how silly this review is. Luis, you are angry because I refused to take your case. I was unaware that lawyers are obliged to accept every potential client that walks through the door. You also don't provide any context. You had a criminal case that was pending for many months. You already had an attorney and you were already set to go to trial. I refused to take your case because no judge would have allowed me to step in at such a late stage and I would have had no time to adequately prepare. If you wanted me to represent you, you should have come in months ago when you were first charged rather than waiting for the very end.

I will start by saying I had called a number of offices looking for a family attorney. A lot of places wanted to charge me $150+ for a few minutes over the phone. When I called this office they were willing to point me in the right direction, gave me a little under an hour of their time for FREE, and ultimately helped me make the right decision which was hiring an attorney.
I hired Mary Kate Moss. Mary Kate was extremely clear and communicated every step of the way with me. She made me feel heard and gave me helpful advice that would best suit our situation. She made sure that any updates to my case were emailed over to me, so I could review them myself and gave me clear information on how to proceed.
I feel like she was more than fair with the financial side of things. There were several options for our mediation, and she made sure to keep things budgeted appropriately for all parties, gave several choices for mediators with different price options, but also added her own expertise to make sure I understood the processing and how prepare financially for these things. It made things feel a lot less stressful.
I am so grateful for this team, Mary Kate and the experience of this office.

reviews.text: I’ve had the privilege of working with Spencer Phillips for nearly seven years, and his firm has been an invaluable partner to my company. Most recently, Spencer played an instrumental role in advising my company through a merger and acquisition. His insight, professionalism, and steady counsel helped insure a smooth and successful transition for our entire organization. Beyond his legal expertise, what I value most is his responsiveness, practical advice, and genuine care for our business and our people. It’s rare to find someone who combines deep legal knowledge with such integrity and approachability. I am grateful for his partnership and highly recommend him to any business who is looking for trusted, long-term legal counsel.

reviews.text:
I had the privilege of working with Heather Burton on a complex and emotionally difficult employment case. From the very beginning, Heather showed not only a deep knowledge of employment law but also compassion, professionalism and dedication to protecting my rights.
She took the time to carefully review the details of my situation, including extensive documentation of workplace discrimination, harassment and retaliation. Heather was always clear and honest in her communication, setting realistic expectations while also ensuring I felt supported and heard throughout the process.
What impressed me the most was her ability to combine empathy with strong advocacy. She guided me step by step, explained legal options in a way that was easy to understand and fought on my behalf with persistence and integrity. Her negotiation skills were outstanding - she was able to secure a fair resolution to my case and helped bring closure to a very challenging chapter of my professional life.
I am deeply grateful for Heather’s expertise, professionalism and commitment. She made me feel confident during a time when I felt vulnerable and overwhelmed. I would highly recommend Heather Burton and employer lawyer firm to anyone who needs an employment attorney who is not only exceptionally skilled but also genuinely cares about the clients.
reviews.ownerResponse: Inna, thank you so much for the this thoughtful review and all the kind words for Heather. This was beyond kind of you to explain how Heather assisted and fought for you throughout your case. We wish you all the best from the Employer-Lawyer team!

reviews.text: I had high hopes for this place. When I read the reviews most of them said that they had a free consultation call from the first phone call. Well that’s only for business owners not employees. And then the hourly rate goes from $275-500 depending on the level of experience the lawyer has. I asked the lady do you expect employees who just lost their jobs to pay for that??? And is all I got back from her was “ yeah unfortunately that’s just how we do things here”. So pretty much this law firm is only interested in helping employers and not so much employees of the company.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your feedback. We understand that losing a job is difficult, and we hope you're able to find new work soon. Our firm offers free initial calls, but those are typically reserved for business owners seeking ongoing legal counsel. However, if you would like give us a call back, our Founding Attorney will be happy to speak with you for free.

I want to start off by saying that they did a lot of leg abd paperwork, that you do not have to. They find you the appointments, what ever you need, the doctors, the counseling, etc. They are very good at communicating with you and they answer any and all questions you might have .

After being in a car accident and receiving injuries from being hit, which definitely affects me being a massage therapist, I really wish I would have received more of a bigger settlement.
A lot of people have told me that when you get into a car accident the first thing you do besides go to a doctor to get examined, is call the insurance company and settle on a amount before calling a lawyer. If you don't like the number they give you that is when you call a lawyer.
I was still hopefull for a bigger #.  I am grateful and blessed to receive what I did get. But I know that my accident was worth more then i received. I do recommend Valente on assisting you. But remember, every doc. Appointment, medications and counsling etc. It ALL comes out of YOUR  settlement. Be mindful and aware of that. May you drve safe and use discernment in these major choices.
